title: Strict TSConfig, TypeScript 7 Defaults, and Project Graphs · Contract Lens: Config Verification
summary: Create a clean multi-package configuration that fails on unsafe boundaries, unused work, and incompatible module assumptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts config verification increment in a strict TypeScript 7 project configuration. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use showConfig, traceResolution, explainFiles, clean builds, and fixed parallelism to diagnose configuration rather than guess.
Split projects with composite references, explicit outputs, graph ordering, and incremental clean-build evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
